# UC-15.4.12 · APC UPS SNMP Power Factor Trending

## Description

Declining power factor at the UPS output can signal upstream harmonics or mis-sized loads increasing electrical losses.

## Value

Guides electrical remediation and rightsizing projects.

## Implementation

(1) Confirm scaling factor in MIB. (2) Correlate with PDU PF if metered.

## SPL

```spl
index=power sourcetype="snmp:apc:ups" earliest=-7d
| eval pf=tonumber(coalesce(upsAdvOutputPowerFactor, output_power_factor, ""))/100
| where isnotnull(pf)
| timechart span=1h avg(pf) by ups_name
```

## Visualization

Line chart PF; SLA band 0.9–1.0.

## References

- [Schneider Electric — APC product support](https://www.se.com/ww/en/product-category/3100-2000-pdu/)
- [Splunk Connect for SNMP](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/apps#/search=connect%20for%20snmp)
